---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What feature would you like? Describe it clearly.

## Problem It Solves
Why do we need this? What problem does it solve?

## Example Usage
How would users use this feature?

```python
# Example:
python3 main.py --target 192.168.1.1 --new-feature value
```

## Benefits
- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## Alternatives
Are there other ways to solve this?

## Additional Context
Any other information?

## Is This Educational?
Does this help users learn networking concepts? (This is an educational tool)
